name: jo
long_description:
jo is a personal AI that runs on your Mac and a private cloud machine we host for you. It knows your life, improves itself autonomously, chats via Telegram and WhatsApp, and never shares your data. 

Less "chatbot" and more "a second brain that does things."
one_liner: A new personal AI that actually knows you.

name: Humwork
long_description: Humwork lets AI agents chat with human experts in real-time. When AI agents like Claude Code or OpenClaw hit a wall, Humwork's MCP server connects them to a verified domain expert in under 30 seconds. Our experts include senior engineers, lawyers, marketers, designers, and more.
one_liner: Connect AI agents to human experts in 30 seconds

name: Smartbase
long_description:
Smartbase automates order entry for manufacturers.

Today, incoming purchase orders are still entered into the ERP by hand. This often requires multiple full-time employees, even at small manufacturers.

Smartbase removes this manual work by automatically converting incoming purchase orders into ERP orders.

We’ve worked on factory floors, sat side-by-side with employees to learn their workflows, and even slept at a factory. We’re now onboarding our first customers onto five-figure annual contracts.

This is our wedge into automating the $26 billion clerical labor market in U.S. manufacturing.

Sam previously founded a DevOps platform that raised $2M. Taira was the youngest SDE 2 at AWS SageMaker Inference, where he built AI infrastructure for enterprises such as Salesforce.
one_liner: Automated order entry for manufacturers

name: Prism
long_description: Prism is an AI-native recruiting agency. We use software and agents to find companies better people faster.
one_liner: AI-native recruiting agency

name: Clara
long_description:
Clara is an AI primary care and longevity practice from the team that founded and grew Circle Medical to $100M in revenue.

Our mission at Clara is to add one billion years of healthspan to humanity. We do this with an AI with deep clinical knowledge, coupled with the ability to sift through medical data to detect trends and patterns that could be missed.

Unlike Claude or ChatGPT, Clara can see your medical data and then act. Chat with Clara as you would a doctor and Clara can help with you make sense of symptoms, get medication refills, order and understand labs, and achieve health goals. Medical recommendations are preliminary until one of our human medical providers in the loop reviews and approves them.
one_liner: AI primary care doctor

name: Imperfect
long_description: The Imperfect app pulls your data to create a personalized AI coach for your next race. It adapts your training, recovery, and nutrition to how your body is actually responding.
one_liner: AI coach for athletes with real lives and epic goals

name: fuchsia
long_description:
Fuchsia handles hardware compliance end to end, making the process as fast and painless as software compliance has become.

Product safety requirements are fragmented across dozens of regional and industry-specific standards (FCC, FDA, FAA, CE, UL, ISO, RIA) and thousands of codes, leaving companies to spend months and tens of thousands in consultant fees just figuring out what applies. Our AI agents surface every relevant requirement in minutes, drafts the technical documentation, and matches teams with the right testing labs.
one_liner: AI that gets hardware compliance done in weeks, not months.

name: Cignara
one_liner: AI voice & chat agents for sales and customer support at large B2C…

name: 9 Mothers
long_description:
We are making AI weapon systems for the modern battlefield.

Our first product EDDA is a small, low power, low cost fully autonomous-capable counter drone system. It's designed to be used on vehicles, bases, or carried - to stop group 1 suicide drones.
one_liner: AI weapon systems

name: Sazabi
long_description: The AI-native observability platform for fast-moving engineering teams. Backed by tastemakers from the world's top AI companies: Vercel, Graphite, Daytona, Browserbase, LangChain, Mastra, Replit, and more.
one_liner: The AI-native observability platform for fast-moving engineering teams

name: Netter
long_description:
Netter centralizes and structures traditional mid-market data to deploy analytics, workflows and ML pipelines.
- A nursing home group was chasing unpaid invoices manually across disconnected tools. Netter centralized the collection workflows, automated reminders, real-time visibility, task routing.
- A logistics operator had trucks running empty. Netter connected their TMS, ERP and fleet data, and automated route and load optimization. Less fuel, better margins.
- A retail chain had years of loyalty card data sitting unused. Netter cross-referenced it with public demographic data to build precise customer segments and trigger the right promotions to the right people.
one_liner: Data Science Autopilot for the real economy.

name: Superset
long_description: Superset helps engineers run 100s of coding agents in parallel.
one_liner: The IDE for the AI Agents Era

name: Inth
long_description: Automate consent and user data rights compliance. Built for performance and full developer control.
one_liner: Privacy Infrastructure for Developers

name: Regbase
one_liner: Tracking global laws, grants and consultations

name: Bloom
long_description:
Your brand should be beautiful. It should be consistent everywhere. And it should be deployable at scale.

Bloom captures your brand's visual identity and creates on-brand assets in seconds.

We're building the Brand OS: a system that deeply understands your brand and powers everything it touches.
one_liner: Bloom is the Brand OS for your business.

name: Dispatch
long_description:
Dispatch is building refurbishable reentry vehicles that host and return payloads for companies making ultra-high-value materials (semiconductors, biotech, and pharma) that can only be manufactured in space. Right now, these companies have no practical way to manufacture and get their products back to Earth. We solve this bottleneck.

We just returned from the Mojave Desert testing our first full-scale reentry heat shield designed to protect the satellite as it returns from space at Mach 20+, built in an apartment for 100x cheaper than competitors. To test, we held it behind a rocket engine to simulate the forces of atmospheric reentry. IT WORKED! Watch here - https://youtu.be/dhlQmnIoptg

To scale, we anchor permanent infrastructure in orbit - building high power Autonomous Space Stations designed from day one for "lights-out" manufacturing serviced by the reentry vehicles.
one_liner: Satellites for manufacturing in space

name: Hedge
one_liner: AI native specialty insurance company

name: Korso
long_description:
Korso builds AI agents that handle the operational work manufacturers still do manually, including processing RFQs, following up on quotes, coordinating with suppliers, and keeping production on track when things go wrong. Our agents plug into your existing ERP and CRM, understand your workflows, and act on your behalf: triaging incoming requests, chasing delayed orders, notifying customers, and escalating when human judgment is needed.

We built Korso around the reality that enterprise systems cannot afford mistakes. Every agent action passes through verification layers, tools are scoped, and critical operations go through dry-run validation and secondary review. Full audit trails mean you can see exactly what was done, why, and when.

Most AI automation breaks down at the ERP integration layer. Korso's orchestration is built for the messiness of real manufacturing systems, with long-running workflows that span weeks and checkpointing that never loses progress.

Instead of replacing your systems, Korso makes them work harder, so your team spends less time on coordination and more time on the work that actually matters.
one_liner: The Intelligence Layer for Manufacturing.

name: primitive
long_description: Building the communication infrastructure needed for fully autonomous agents
one_liner: Communication for agents

name: Standard Signal
long_description: Standard Signal is the first hedge fund that researches and executes trades purely with AI. Our custom models discover and trade on new fundamental truths about the world before humans can.
one_liner: Hedge fund where AI researches and executes every trade

name: Stage
long_description:
Teams are shipping faster than ever with AI, but engineers are merging changes that neither they nor their reviewers fully understand, leading to bugs in production and overwhelming cognitive debt.

Stage is a new code review platform built for today’s fast moving teams. Instead of forcing readers to piece things together from unorganized diffs, Stage breaks changes down into structured chapters so teams can understand what's happening and ship with confidence.
one_liner: Code review platform for today’s engineers

name: Gikl, Inc
long_description: ScienceSwarm makes AI useful for what matters. Coding assistants turned millions of people into software developers — we're doing the same for science. Our platform lets anyone point their AI at unsolved problems in math, science, and engineering, submit approaches and hypotheses, and verify the work with a community of AI-powered enthusiasts. AI's biggest impact won't be personal productivity. It will be unlocking scientific breakthroughs that humans alone can't reach.
one_liner: Accelerating scientific discovery with AI

name: Totalis
one_liner: derivative layer for prediction markets

name: Replicas
long_description:
Replicas is a background coding agent that allows you to delegate tasks to Claude Code or Codex from Slack, Linear, GitHub, and more. Each task works inside of a sandboxed virtual machine, allowing teams to heavily parallelize work and burn through tickets.

Replicas agents output higher quality PRs via feedback loops - each task automatically is notified and fixes CI failures and reads all code reviews. With Environments, engineering teams can configure agents to run their entire codebase locally, verify its work, and provide preview URLs.
one_liner: Background coding agents for engineering teams

name: Rudus
long_description: Rudus is an AI-powered takeoff and estimation platform built for concrete contractors. We cut takeoff time by 70% and help estimators bid 2-5× more projects without adding headcount. From plan upload to bid package, every part of the workflow gets faster.
one_liner: AI Takeoffs Built for Concrete

name: Scope
long_description:
Scope helps companies understand and improve how AI agents discover and use their product.

As more products gets used through AI agents like Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and similar agents, agents are starting to influence which tools get chosen, how they get set up, and whether they keep getting used. Most companies still cannot see that process clearly.

We run real workflows across agents and show teams when the agent picks them versus a competitor, where it breaks, where docs or product surfaces confuse the agent, and what to change to get better results and a better agent experience.

I started Scope after working on interpretability research for closed-source models at Princeton and later as an ML engineer in GEO/AEO. I kept seeing the same pattern: these systems were shaping real product discovery and usage, but companies had very little visibility into what the model was actually doing.

We are starting with products that agents can directly interact with, especially APIs, infra products, CLIs, and MCP servers.
one_liner: We make your product discoverable and usable by any AI agent

name: Lightsprint
long_description:
Lightsprint is a product development platform designed to let non-engineering teammates ship real features to an existing codebase. PMs, designers and founders describe what they want in plain English. Lightsprint reads the codebase, presents trade-offs and visual options styled to the actual app, generates a live preview, and ships a real pull request. It also closes the product loop - connect tools like Granola to surface insights from customer conversations, so our product agent builds what customers actually need.

The company is founded by Ben Ong, an AI investor who previously scaled AI products at SEA Group (NYSE: SE) and Temasek ($300B fund), Benedict Chan who was VP Engineering at Chainlink and CTO at BitGo (NYSE:BTGO), and Heng Hong Lee who built Facebook Messenger in 2013 and was Director of Engineering at Fazz (YC S17).
one_liner: Collaborative product development platform that lets non-engineering…

name: matforge
long_description:
We build AI scientists that discover new materials for the semiconductor industry - specifically datacenters and fabs. Finding novel materials today takes 10+ years of lab work. We aim to compress that timeline to months, using a swarm of AI agents.

Akash completed his PhD at Stanford on material discovery for semiconductors. The materials he discovered for nanoscale interconnects have been adopted into the roadmaps of Intel and TSMC. Advaith was the founding applied scientist at Persona AI (acquired by Luma Labs), where he built long horizon autonomous agents for major telecom and crypto companies.

Power consumption and heat release from AI chips is doubling every year. The semiconductor industry needs new materials to keep this exponential going - Matforge will help find them.
one_liner: AI scientists to discover semiconductor materials

name: Saffron
long_description:
Saffron allows companies to quickly evaluate how well software engineers use AI to code. 

The way engineers write code has fundamentally changed, but the way companies evaluate them hasn't. Saffron gives teams full visibility into how candidates use AI agents to build, debug, and ship real features on an actual codebase. 

Saffron was founded by Robert Chondro (formerly MIT and Jane Street), Jerry Yao (Stanford and Jane Street), and Kazuma Choji (Harvey Mudd, published in NeurIPS and ICML), and is backed by Y Combinator (P26) and Afore Capital.
one_liner: Helping your company find 10x engineers.

name: Chert
long_description: Chert helps companies scale their outbound through iMessage. We integrate into existing GTM stacks, find iMessage-qualified leads, and help book 1-5 meetings per week.
one_liner: AI Agents for Automated iMessage Outbound

name: Nine Fives
one_liner: Simple, Networked, Driverless, RF Test Equipment

name: Andustry
long_description: We build AI agents that automate discovery for industrials products, in particular mid-size machinery. Say goodbye to reaching out to 100s of suppliers, not hearing back from them and getting your first quote after several weeks. Suppliers also get to automate responding to customers, entering once what they offer and receiving ready-to-fulfill orders.
one_liner: AI to source and sell industrial products

name: InLoop Robotics
long_description:
We are building AI-native fulfillment powered by robotics.
Warehouses without human labor that get better, faster, and cheaper with every order.

Most robotics companies wait until their system is perfect before deploying. We don't. We ship imperfect policies into real warehouses, detect failures in real time, recover automatically when we can, and bring in a remote human operator when we can't.

Every failure becomes training data. Every intervention makes the system better. The result is a fulfillment system that continuously learns from production.
one_liner: Deploying robots that ask for help!

name: Dayjob
long_description: Dayjob builds autonomous AI workers for transport operations. Our scheduling agent plugs into existing ERPs and continuously re-optimises routes in real time - handling new jobs, driver changes, and exceptions automatically. Customers in waste management see 8%+ efficiency gains from day one.
one_liner: AI Agents for Industrial Logistics

name: Trellis
long_description:
Short-term rental operators suffer from diseconomies of scale. As listing count grows, operational complexity increases exponentially, managers lose control, reviews drop, and so do rates and homeowner retention. 

Most are stuck between 10 and 50 listings, using 5 to 10 different software tools, none flexible enough for their needs. There is no unified data layer of their company. They navigate in the dark, reacting to problems rather than delivering hospitality.

Trellis unifies everything into one platform, giving AI agents complete context over operations (communications, tasks, workforce, smart homes, bookings, accounting, revenue management) so they can orchestrate work end to end.

We believe software is being commoditized. We reached feature parity with competitors in two weeks. If agents can build software that fast, then every SaaS product becomes a software builder. The vendor provides the trellis: the fixed infrastructure. The AI grows the vines: dynamic features, workflows, and interfaces that adapt to each customer. No more adapting to the tool. The tool adapts to you.

But the real value is not in what the agent does for one company. It is in what it learns across all of them. Every workflow that works, every SOP that survives contact with guests, every resolution pattern that prevents a bad review feeds back into the network. The agent shares best practices, battle proven SOPs, and guest intelligence across companies. This creates a network of property management brands where the experience is designed by humans and ensured by software. Quality becomes predictable. Scale becomes unlimited. Hospitality is no longer a people problem, it is a software problem.

Airbnb built the marketplace. We are building the machine that runs it.
one_liner: Autonomous Agents for Short Term Rentals

name: Refortifai
long_description: Refortifai builds RL environments to solve and evaluate complex tasks involving electronic design.
one_liner: Reasoning for Electronic Design Automation

name: Tenet Industries
long_description:
Tenet Industries is building low-cost, mass-manufacturable strike drones. 

We have developed our own HW and SW platform optimized for automated manufacturing, enabling hyperscaling of production across multiple strike categories (FPV, fixed-wing, shahed-type, missiles).

We're using design-for-automation and first principles to reimagine how a defense product is developed and manufactured. Thereby lowering the cost and filling the arsenals of the west.

Our first product is a kamikaze quadcopter.
one_liner: Drones as ammunition.

name: Hub.xyz
one_liner: API for real-world training data.

name: Light Anchor
long_description:
Light Anchor (YC P26) builds fully autonomous e-commerce brands that run at the speed of compute. 

Consumer brands have always been limited by the speed of humans: hiring, coordinating, and sleeping. AI agents that now run operations end-to-end break all those constraints, making a new kind of consumer business possible: one capped by compute, not headcount.

Today, Light Anchor operates one flagship brand and multiple experiment stores, all run by AI agents on a shared platform that compounds with every new brand launched. The vision is thousands of consumer businesses, operating with little to no human intervention.
one_liner: Autonomous e-commerce

name: Pulsent
long_description:
Pulsent continuously watches how your users and interacts with your product and engages them at the right moment to convert, upsell, and retain. 

As companies scale, founders, account managers and customer success teams can only take care of a small fraction of users. The rest receive generic, annoying and poorly timed communication. Opportunities are missed, customers churn, and revenue is lost.

The core problem is that user behavior is fragmented across tools like PostHog, Stripe, Salesforce, etc., making it impossible to understand users in real time. We unify all data into a single view and let AI agents act on top. This only recently became possible with advances in visual AI (dec ‘25), allowing agents to watch sessions and understand behavior at human or better level.

Pulsent detects expansion and churn signals, prioritizes high-value accounts, and executes through AI agents across channels like email, LinkedIn, and WhatsApp. It increases conversion and reduces churn without adding headcount.

We already have paying customers, process hundreds of millions of events daily, and are seeing strong demand from PLG B2B Clients. Nicolò is an ex-BCG who has scaled two startups to millions in ARR. Arseniy worked for several years at Datadog handling billions of datapoints. We’ve worked together for 3+ years and experienced this problem firsthand in our previous startup.
one_liner: AI Agents that watch, engage and convert your users.

name: GovGuard
long_description:
Today, when a city gets a FOIA request, the process is still painfully manual.

City clerks have to hunt through archived emails, meeting minutes, PDFs, and shared drives just to find the relevant records. Many offices still manually black out sensitive information with a Sharpie, line by line.

Local governments spend billions processing these requests. It’s slow, expensive, and a large request can create massive backlogs. If a city misses the deadline for a request, they can be sued for failing to comply with public records law.

GovGuard uses AI agents to automatically search across years of records, flag sensitive information for redaction, and prepare draft response letters for review. Our redaction engine handles harder edge cases like trade secrets and privileged material. Legacy tools require clerks to manually cite state codes for every redaction, while GovGuard is built with these exemptions.

The new surge of AI-generated requests are overwhelming clerk offices. Most cities we speak with are seeing request volume grow 2x year over year, with no increase in staff. The tools they have today are basically Jira. They help manage the ticket/request, but not complete the work.
one_liner: AI Infrastructure for Government Agencies

name: Kinro
long_description:
Kinro helps companies sell insurance through AI assistants such as ChatGPT. We build AI sales agents that manage the end-to-end insurance sales process, from answering questions, personalized coverage explanations and quoting. These agents are continuously evaluated and improved through our proprietary platform, optimizing sales performance while remaining 100% compliant.

Selling insurance requires strict regulatory compliance, deep carrier integrations, and extremely reliable answers. Platforms like OpenAI and Google remain general-purpose and are less likely to build the vertical infrastructure required for regulated industries.

Today, Kinro serves brokers and direct-to-consumer carriers across the US and Europe. Insurance distribution is huge: insurers pay roughly $100B+ in commissions annually, and distributors spend $10B+ every year on advertising to acquire customers.

Pierre-Alexandre led research improving Gemini for financial services at DeepMind. Parth led infrastructure for training and inference at Zoox. Corentin was the first employee in an insurance startup and worked closely with many insurance leaders.
one_liner: AI sales agents for insurance. Sell everywhere your buyers are.

name: Juno
long_description:
Juno is an AI personal health assistant for the 1B+ people living with chronic illness. Juno builds a longitudinal health profile from conversations, biometrics, and medical history to identify patterns behind symptoms and provide tailored guidance. 

Isaac and Marshall started building Juno after growing up with chronic conditions and spending years trying to understand their symptoms. Like millions of others, they waited months for appointments and struggled to explain complex medical history in 15 minutes. As a result, key signals are missed, contributing to an average diagnosis time of 7.6 years. Even after receiving a diagnosis, patients are often left without a clear treatment plan and have to manage their condition alone. 

Many use AI chatbots for support, but without context on their medical history or symptom progression, they receive generic advice that is rarely actionable. Juno solves this by building a continuous, structured health profile for each user and connecting this fragmented health information. We spent the last year conducting research at Oxford and UCL to build our proprietary engagement layer for daily conversations, allowing Juno to ask the right questions at the right time and understand each user's health better than anyone else ever could. 

We launched in October and are already at $600k in annual run rate, supporting 50,000+ patients globally. We’re building a future where everyone has a private clinical specialist in their pocket, 24/7.
one_liner: AI Health Assistant for Chronic Illness

name: Zolvo
long_description: Commercial lenders manage billions in assets but service their loans like it's 2005: spreadsheets, legacy software, and teams of people doing manual reconciliation all day. Zolvo replaces that entire back office with AI. We automate reconciliation, verification, collections, and reporting so lenders can scale their portfolios without scaling their teams. We're building the operating system for commercial lending
one_liner: AI that automates servicing for commercial lenders

name: Interfaze
long_description:
Interfaze is an AI model built on a new architecture that merges specialized DNN/CNN models with LLMs for developer tasks that require deterministic output and high consistency like OCR, web scraping, classification, Speech-to-text (STT) and more.

Read paper:https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.04101
one_liner: AI model built for deterministic developer tasks

name: Elyra
long_description: Elyra is an AI reservation system for restaurants with built-in voice and email agents that handle bookings end-to-end.
one_liner: AI for Restaurant Reservations

name: HEVN, inc
long_description:
HEVN is a b2b financial platform where international companies can run their business globally with USD.
↓
> Use USD cards with cashback and do not pay fees on converting local currency, by paying to Google/Meta ads

> Pay/get paid in local currency via named accounts in EU, Hong Kong and UAE banks 

> (soon) store USD in FDIC-insured account in a US bank, even if your company does not have EIN
one_liner: "Brex" for international companies

name: qomplement
long_description: Early stage AI lab based in San Francisco building the layer between unstructured data and enterprise systems.
one_liner: AI Agents for Document Filling

name: Pavoot
long_description:
Pavoot is an AI agent for events that helps marketing and sales teams source the right attendees, personalize each guest’s experience, and turn events into pipeline.

Companies spend millions on events because relationships drive revenue. Yet most interactions are never captured, event experiences remain generic, and standard follow-ups fail to convert high-potential attendees.

Before the event, Pavoot identifies the attendee profiles most likely to convert and sends personalized invitations. During the event, it helps create relevant introductions and capture important conversations. After the event, it identifies top leads, generates personalized follow-ups, and syncs engagement back into the CRM.

===

Pavoot turns events into personalized customer journeys. Book a demo: pavoot.com
one_liner: AI that turns events into pipeline

name: Standout
long_description:
Standout gives every talent and company an autonomous agent that represents them, assess the other side, and makes intros when it matters.

Why it matters? Because this is hiring today:
- Talent use AI to apply to 100s of jobs - this is spam.
- Founders/Recruiting send 100s of AI-generated messages to hire the same talent - this is spam.

This has to stop.

Talent stays fully anonymous until they accept an intro. The best way for passively exploring the market and not missing a life changing opportunity.

In 1 month, 10k talent / 60 companies / 100 intros.
one_liner: Agentic hiring marketplace

name: Userlens
long_description:
Most B2B churn is preventable - most teams just see it too late. 

By the time a CSM notices, the champion has already quietly disengaged, key features went unadopted, and the renewal conversation is damage control. The dangerous part? The customer might still be logging in, but they've stopped using what actually matters. 

Userlens catches all of that months earlier.

Our AI agents monitor every user at every account the way your best CSM watches your top five strategic accounts:
- feature adoption
- usage trends
- champion engagement
- sentiment shifts in Slack and Intercom
- open support issues. 

When a signal hits (churn risk, renewal, expansion opportunity), Userlens doesn't just alert you. It builds the talking points and deck on top of your team's approved templates and playbook. If you have CSMs, Userlens makes every one of them your best. If you don't have one yet, Userlens runs your book like the best CSM money could buy.
one_liner: AI agents that predicts churn months before it happens.

name: Sherpa
long_description: Sherpa automatically increases website conversion rates by analyzing visitor behavior, building new page variants, and continuously A/B testing them. Customers typically see a 15-20% lift on their primary conversion metric in their first 30 days.
one_liner: Turn more website visitors into customers

name: Salesgraph
long_description:
Salesgraph equips reps with the most relevant context throughout the deal stage, providing proactive pre-call notes and post-call next steps. Sellers are CEOs of their deals; they need to know who the buyer is, what triggered them to take the first call, what their pain points are, how much value this new tool is bringing, are there any technical blockers, etc. 

A sale is only good when it doesn't feel like a sale to your customer, but rather the sales rep solved a problem for the customer. This was the problem Ricardo and I solved at Mintlify. We created a business case generator that took in call recordings, background news triggers and job updates, Mintlify's ROI and Pricing calculator, past deals won, and customer case studies --> produced a 3 page document expressing the value Mintlify provided + why the quote presented is justifiable. In doing so we closed more enterprise deals at a higher ACV as our champion was able to build a better purchasing case internally. 

Our goal is to empower every sales team to close deals at a higher ACV, while making sure reps learn from their mistakes and create a smooth sales experience for their end customer.
one_liner: the context layer for fast moving sales teams

name: RentAHuman
one_liner: Marketplace for AI agents to hire humans.

name: Andco
one_liner: End-to-end case workups for personal injury firms.

name: Arga Labs
long_description:
Arga provides realistic testing environments so anyone (human or agent) can test any change.

Deploy your code/agent into a sandbox that runs against replicas of SaaS tools (Stripe, Slack, Google Drive, etc.). Twins support the same APIs & SDKs as the real software, and you can spin up thousands of instances in parallel and seed them using natural language. Run real workflows, surface edge cases, and observe how your code/agents actually behave before hitting production.
one_liner: The validation infrastructure for AI agents

name: Drip
long_description: We build the way for you to create context for all your communications, finances, and inbound.
one_liner: The company brain

name: Callab AI
long_description:
Callab AI - AI voice agents for contact centers. Over half the world's contact center infrastructure still runs on legacy telephony (CUCM, on-prem PBX, carrier-grade SIP) - a $70B+ market where current AI voice platforms can't natively integrate. 

We plug into these environments without requiring a rip-and-replace. We serve clients across three continents, including brands like DunkinDonut.
one_liner: AI voice agents for enterprise telephony systems.

name: Pairio
long_description: Pairo is an AI mobile app to help technicians fix broken equipment in factories. Users just take a picture of the broken machine and we search thousands of pages of manuals to find the right solution.
one_liner: AI-native industrial maintenance software

name: Taiga
long_description:
Taiga automates medical billing for doctor's offices. A doctor uploads their visit data, our AI figures out the right billing codes, checks the claim for errors, and submits it to insurance, dealing with any denials. Faster billing, fewer rejected claims, less busywork.                                                       
                                                                                                                        
We're Nanda and Adam, friends since 3rd grade. Both of our parents are doctors with their own practices, and billing was always a source of stress and lost revenue for them. We want providers to treat patients while we handle the rest.
one_liner: Full-stack Medical Billing Services

name: StableBrowse
long_description: We are making the world's fastest browser for your AI agents. Agents don’t need to see UIs like us humans do. We give agents a semantic understanding of the web instead of brittle visual interfaces. Your agents can perform deep research, large-scale scraping, and complex automation—more efficiently with our agentic browser that turns the web into a native protocol for LLMs.
one_liner: Browser for AI agents

name: Kimpton AI
long_description:
Kimpton is the AI research platform for the buy side, built by ex-Goldman engineers who left to start a hedge fund with $10M and ran it for four years before productizing the stack.

Portfolio managers spend most of their day on work that isn't investing: filings, earnings prep, 13Fs, peer benchmarking, thesis validation, trade writeups. 

Kimpton runs all of it autonomously and delivers structured Trade Proposals with full rationale, fitted to a portfolio manager's mandate and strategy. 

Risk profile, style, and constraints live in plain-text mandate.md and strategy.md files that drive every analysis the system performs. 

The rest of the desk sits alongside: Deep Research cited to source, natural-language Dashboards, Agentic Charting & Backtests, scheduled Skills for recurring workflows, and auto-generated Reports. 

Coverage includes FactSet pricing, fundamentals, estimates, transcripts, ownership, and M&A data, plus live prediction markets from Polymarket.    

Humans make the decisions. AI does everything else.
one_liner: AI for portfolio managers

name: Lamina Labs
long_description: We are building the fastest visual infrastructure for EdTech AI applications. With a simple text prompt, students get accurate visual explanations in seconds, making high-quality learning dramatically faster and cheaper.
one_liner: Visual infrastructure for EdTech AI applications

name: Lab0
long_description:
Enterprise software implementation is broken,  and it has been for decades. 
Every rollout, whether it's a traditional ERP or a new AI system, requires months of manual integration, configuration, and tuning done by armies of system integrators and forward-deployed engineers. 
Lab0 builds agentic systems that automate this layer, compressing months-long implementations into weeks.
one_liner: Automated forward-deployed engineers (AI FDEs)

name: Gojiberry AI
long_description:
GojiberryAI is a GTM Brain that helps sales teams find and convert high-intent leads by continuously learning what works across their go-to-market. Instead of relying on cold lists, it detects real buying signals like competitor engagement and social signals, job changes, hiring spikes, or funding events, then prioritizes the best prospects based on ICP fit and intent. It analyzes each lead’s context, generates personalized messages, starts conversations, and follows up automatically until a meeting is booked, while constantly optimizing targeting, messaging, and timing so performance compounds over time. 

The result is simple: 2 to 5x more replies, more qualified conversations, and a predictable pipeline without wasting time on low-intent prospects.
one_liner: GTM Brain for small sales teams

name: Napkin Math
long_description: Napkin Math is the food journal for real people. Stop counting calories, get personalized insights and realistic goals. Easily keep a beautiful food journal, get deep insights on your data with AI, and share your table with friends.
one_liner: Building Napkin Math, AI-powered food journaling for real people

name: Ontora
long_description: Ontora gives C-suite leaders AI agents that interview every employee to uncover process bottlenecks across their organization. Consultants spend months doing this manually; Ontora does it in hours.
one_liner: AI agents that interview every employee to map how work gets done.

name: Oddpool
one_liner: Institutional data broker for prediction markets

name: Keyframe Labs
long_description: Our real-time, generative models turn AI into lifelike video calls. Deploy in minutes with a few lines of embed code. Photorealism, emotion, and scale for just $0.06 per minute.
one_liner: Turn agents into lifelike video calls. $0.06 a minute.

name: Adialante
long_description:
We know how to improve cancer outcomes by 8x-10x: you catch it early. 

MRI is the most robust and powerful cancer-detection tool in the world, yet systems cost millions to purchase, take months to install, and require high levels of technical skill to operate. We've redesigned MRI from the ground up with new physics, algorithms, and hardware, all to bring cancer screening to the entire world. 

Our mobile MRI is an imaging clinic on wheels. No equipment to buy, no infrastructure needed. For a flat per-scan fee, any medical site can offer MRI cancer screening. Starting with prostate cancer. Then everything else.
one_liner: Cancer screening without barriers

name: Lumius
long_description:
Ultrasound today is still mostly 2D. Clinicians have to imagine the 3D anatomy in their head while also moving the probe at the same time. This makes procedures like vascular access hard to learn and perform consistently, especially for beginners. ~50% fail on their first attempt. Hospitals also spend millions each year on 2D ultrasound training. Meanwhile, existing 3D ultrasound devices can cost >10× as much.

Lumius is building fast, smart, and accessible 3D ultrasound systems to eliminate this 2D guesswork. Our technology shows a clear, real-time 3D view of what’s inside the body. It works over a large volume, not just a thin slice. The device is also affordable, compact, and portable.

We are starting with vascular access, especially central line. Future use cases include blood clot detection, tumor diagnosis, and biopsy guidance. Our long-term vision is a universal 3D ultrasound platform that brings easy-to-use, real-time imaging to a wide range of clinical and eventually consumer applications.
one_liner: Fast, smart, accessible 3D ultrasound for everyone

name: Prototyping.io
long_description: Prototyping.io turns CAD designs into real mechanical parts through an AI-driven manufacturing system. We analyze designs for manufacturability and automate production workflows to deliver high-quality parts faster and at lower cost.
one_liner: Autonomous manufacturing for mechanical parts

name: Sidekick
long_description: Sidekick is an AI-powered SMS assistant for frontline workers in manufacturing, auto dealerships, and retail. The idea came from Justin's father, who owns a manufacturing facility and asked him to build a tool to help with worker onboarding, training, and organizing company knowledge. Workers text questions in any language and get instant answers from their company's documents — no app, no login, works on any phone. They can send photos of equipment for instant identification or voice memos when their hands are dirty or they're wearing gloves. Managers upload documents and record video walkthroughs; Sidekick automatically generates step-by-step tutorials and a searchable knowledge base. When Sidekick can't answer, it escalates to the manager via SMS and learns from the response, getting smarter with every interaction.
one_liner: AI-powered SMS assistant for deskless workers.

name: Alchemy
long_description:
Alchemy helps biotech and pharma researchers train and share computer vision models to convert raw images into numerical data, reducing analysis time by 98%.

All a researcher has to do is upload their images, describe what they need in plain language, and our agents help assemble their tailored analysis pipeline, select the right models for their specific images, and let them verify every step before exporting reproducible, publication-ready results.
one_liner: AI-powered image analysis for life sciences

name: Mount
long_description:
Mount is the Insurer for the Agent Economy.

When AI systems autonomously sign contracts, manage finances, or talk to customers, every failure becomes the deployer's liability. Existing insurers don't want to cover this. They lack the data, the models, and the speed to assess deployed AI systems.              

We're solving this by building a risk evaluation and mitigation platform specifically for AI Agents. Mount's platform red-teams them, scores their operational risk, and issues ADR certifications (the SOC 2 for AI agents). Every evaluation generates proprietary risk data that feeds our underwriting engine, a data moat no competitor can replicate.

The AI agent market is projected to grow from $7.6B to $183B by 2033. The EU AI Act and upcoming regulation require deployers to manage AI risk. Over 90% of businesses want coverage for AI risks, yet no insurer is built to price this new risk category. We are that company.

Fabian studied CS at ETH Zürich with a focus on machine learning and has been building AI systems since. John founded an AI-first media company at 18 and scaled it to 400K in annual revenue. Together, they combine deep technical AI expertise with the operational intensity to build a full-stack insurance company from scratch.
one_liner: Insure and secure your AI Agents

name: AICE Power
long_description:
AICE Power makes a new generation of sensors that give commercial buildings full visibility into their energy consumption. 
We deploy on any site in one day with no disruption, at 5% the cost of traditional Building Management Systems. 
The platform automatically detects anomalies and alerts teams in real time, before inefficiencies show up on the bill.
one_liner: Smart energy monitoring for buildings.

name: Complir
long_description: AI-powered product compliance platform that makes it easy for retailers to launch and scale products across borders without drowning in regulatory work. Complir's AI agents handle the regulations and documentation across every market you sell in - and keep your entire catalogue audit-ready.
one_liner: Vanta for physical products

name: Harbor
long_description:
Harbor is a new, AI-enabled system of record for clinical trial data that replaces legacy electronic data capture (EDC) systems. Today, medical device and pharma companies spend months setting up custom EDCs that research sites then spend hours per subject per day entering data into. With Harbor, the EDC is spun up simply by reading your clinical trial protocol and research sites upload raw source documents into the platform, skipping the tedious and error-prone data entry process altogether.

EDCs haven’t fundamentally changed since the 1990s. They are passive, regulatory compliant data bins that cause massive trial delays, coordinator burnout, and weeks of back-and-forth to resolve data errors. Because of this, data management currently consumes ~30% of total clinical trial budgets.

With LLM and document extraction capabilities finally reaching the accuracy, reliability, and traceability required in high-risk domains, Harbor is redefining the way data is collected and monitored in clinical trials, all while remaining fully GCP- and 21 CFR Part 11 compliant.

After months of building our initial product, our platform is now live with its first few clinical studies. For our largest customer and their 1600 subject randomized trial, we were able to use our internal tools to get their study database configured in just one week, which was ten times faster than legacy EDC vendors quoted.

We built Harbor because we lived through this problem. Albert spent four years in clinical trials and regulatory strategy for a medical device startup, spending weeks at clinical sites watching coordinators battle legacy software firsthand. Nate brings the technical firepower, having built scalable software at Google and Ramp and as employee #1 at a previous YC startup.
one_liner: AI system-of-record for clinical trial data

name: smol machines
long_description:
Smol machines solve the problem of "but app works on my machine" by shipping the machine.

Smol machine enables devs to ship a lightweight virtual machine with any software, similar to how Electron ships an entire browser with the web app.
one_liner: Ship software faster with portable, self contained virtual machines.

name: Archer
long_description:
Payout anything. Anywhere. Anytime.

Archer is a conversational AI platform that turns any event into an instant payout.
Define a behavior in plain English. Archer tracks it. Money and rewards move automatically.

We deploy AI agents with the ability to send payments and rewards globally using stablecoin and card rails.
No dashboards. No manual ops. No engineering bottlenecks.

If something happens in your product or business, Archer can pay on it.

Examples:
Pay users as they complete onboarding steps
Send partners revenue share when deals close
Trigger commissions the moment a sale happens
Reward customers with physical gifts based on milestones
Automate payouts for creators, affiliates, and teams in real time

Archer acts as your autonomous payout layer.
It connects to your data, tracks any metric you care about, and executes instantly when conditions are met.

From user growth to partner programs to internal performance.
If you can define it, Archer pays it.

The interface for money is changing.
Talk to your bank. Program your money. Let Archer run the rest.
one_liner: Payout. Anything.

name: Minicor
long_description:
AI companies selling into legacy industries can't go live because their customers' systems of record are Windows desktop apps with no APIs. The only way in is clicking through the UI, and it breaks constantly.

Minicor is a platform for building self-healing desktop automations at scale. Speak the automation into existence through your favourite coding agent via our MCP, or to us directly, and get an API endpoint to trigger it. One API call triggers a full desktop workflow on a Windows VM. On-premise, cloud, or Citrix.

Video replay, error logging, and scaling built in.
one_liner: Managed, self healing desktop automation at scale

name: Datost
long_description: The first AI data analyst that has its own computer. It sees and understands your docs, Slack, databases, data lakes, and codebase. Query, debug, and analyze right where your team works.
one_liner: AI data analyst in Slack. Democratize data.

name: Ara
long_description:
Ara is building the fastest personal AI agent computing environment that works for you 24/7.

Users get a real deployed site on their FIRST message in around 30s. Reducing the friction to personal software to absolute 0.
one_liner: Worlds fastest website builder in your sms

name: Zibra Labs
former_names: TBD. We don't have a name yet.
long_description:
Quant research is generating candidate strategies orders of magnitude faster than backtesting infrastructure can evaluate them. AI has further accelerated alpha research from a handful of signals per quarter to hundreds per day. The bottleneck has moved from researcher time to compute throughput.

We're building large HPC clusters (100 - 50,000 nodes) that can run up to 6.4M tasks in parallel across multiple cloud providers on spot instances.

Our goal is to make backtesting strategies simple, fast, and cheap at scale.
one_liner: HPC for Quant Trading Firms running backtesting at scale.

name: PLAN0 AI
long_description:
PLAN0 is an AI-powered preconstruction cost intelligence platform serving real estate developers, general contractors, and investors. We analyze architectural plans using computer vision AI models trained on tens of thousands of examples to generate detailed, industry standard cost estimates in 30 minutes vs. 2+ weeks traditionally.

The platform is also building a proprietary database of real-time localized cost data that feed its analytics and forecasting tools. Using quant finance inspired deep neural networks, PLAN0 can decompose construction costs in market observable factors to predict all local trade level costs up to 24 months out with high accuracy.

The vision is to develop the CoStar or Bloomberg of construction – a system of record and intelligence layer that allows real estate stakeholders to underwrite, design, and benchmark development projects with greater speed, precision, and confidence.
one_liner: AI powered construction cost estimation & analytics.

name: Chronicle Labs
long_description: Chronicle Labs is a staging environment for enterprise AI agents: we capture every event the agent sees in production and backtest it, so customers can safely test new behaviors without breaking anything.
one_liner: Staging Environments for Enterprise AI Agents

name: Tasklet
long_description:
AI chatbots can answer questions, but they can't do your work — they aren't connected to your tools, can't take actions, and stop running when you close the tab. Meanwhile, knowledge workers are still spending most of their day switching between dozens of SaaS apps, manually stitching together workflows that should be automated.

Tasklet is the AI agent that actually does the work. It connects to every tool you use — via thousands of built-in integrations, any HTTP API, or MCP servers — and takes real actions on your behalf: pulling reports, updating CRMs, triaging emails, processing data, and more. When it needs a UI, it generates one on the fly. When it needs to crunch numbers or do bulk operations, it writes and runs code in a cloud sandbox. When it needs to interact with a website that doesn't have an API, it uses a real browser. And because it runs in the cloud 24/7, you can set up triggers to have it take ongoing responsibility for workflows — not just do something once, but handle it going forward.

The product is deliberately simple: a chat interface where you talk to an extremely capable agent. But underneath that simplicity is a cloud-native agent runtime, best-in-class context engineering, a universal connections layer, and multi-model support that keeps us on the frontier as AI improves. 

We think legacy SaaS is being unbundled by agents, and Tasklet is the operating system that ties it all together.
one_liner: The cloud agent operating system for knowledge work

name: Kuli
long_description:
Kuli is an AI agent for social media and influencer marketing teams at the world's largest consumer brands. Our agent watches every video on socials in the brand's context and helps marketers get work done to launch their campaigns 4x faster.

Previous platforms gave marketers databases to search through and a CRM. Kuli actually watches the content. Marketers at team like Supercell, Disney and Havas use it to scout creators, run analysis on trends and competitor strategies, and analyse what makes their campaign perform better.

For 10 years, influencer marketing meant more tools, more tabs, more spreadsheets. Kuli replaces all of that with one single agent you orchestrate. One marketer with Kuli does what a $50K/month agency bills for manual tasks.
one_liner: Claude Cowork for social media and creator marketers

name: Ardent
long_description: Clone any postgres DB regardless of size in 6s so agents can test their work
one_liner: Database sandboxes for Agents

name: BioStack Platforms
long_description:
BioStack is building the data engine for healthcare and drug discovery AI. The bottleneck is not models. It is access to high-quality biological data. Clinical and experimental data is fragmented, unstructured, and locked inside hospitals, labs, and CROs, while generating new data is slow and expensive. BioStack fixes this with proprietary clinical and preclinical data pipelines that turn real biomedical workflows into ML-ready training environments.

We structure longitudinal multimodal data across imaging, EHR, and experimental assays, then package it for post-training and reinforcement learning so models can learn how research and care actually happen. Instead of static datasets, BioStack gives AI labs workflow-aligned data and environments that improve reasoning, decision-making, and real-world performance in biology and medicine.
one_liner: Real world training envs for healthcare AI models

name: Silmaril
long_description: Silmaril is self-healing prompt injection defense for AI native applications and agents. It understands application context to block 2x as many threats as current SOTA defenses with 10x lower latency. Customers plug us into agentic frameworks like LangGraph with 5 lines of code. Silmaril has stopped $28M of damages for customers.
one_liner: Prompt injection defense that is self-healing

name: Pops
long_description:
Pops lets people play, remix, and share AI games with friends.

Discover an infinite feed of games, challenges, quizzes, and other fun interactive experiences made by others. Every play instantly becomes a funny gameplay/reaction video you can send to friends, post online, or use to challenge someone to beat your score.

For creators, Pops makes it easier than ever to bring ideas to life and get them played. Instead of learning complex game engines, writing code, or fighting for distribution, anyone can create or remix a playable game in seconds. Bring your ideas, and Pops brings the audience.
one_liner: Create & play AI games with friends

name: Saudara AI
long_description:
Saudara AI is an AI broker connecting American brands with vetted overseas factories. International sourcing is broken. We're fixing it.

US brands import over $3 trillion in goods every year and lose billions to ghost suppliers, hidden fees, and missed deadlines. The best factories sit behind decades-old relationships. We have them. Our AI handles the rest.

A real broker on every deal, supercharged by AI. 10x faster, at a fraction of the cost. We are the on-ramp.
one_liner: AI Broker Connecting American Brands With The World's Best Factories

name: Memory Store
long_description:
One memory for your team's agents. 

Turn every meeting, Claude session, and Slack chat into context your team and agents share.
one_liner: Shared context for all of your team's agents.

name: ANORIA
long_description: We've spent decades tracking everything. Sleep. Recovery. Steps. All proxies for how we feel. Performance is 90% mental. And yet no one has built the feedback loop for our emotions. We close that loop by designing a device that understands how you feel, tells you why, and what you can do about it. Emotional intelligence becomes trainable, so you can better connect and create with those around you.
one_liner: The first wearable that reads your emotions to enhance your EQ.

name: Ornadyne
long_description:
Ornadyne builds flapping-wing drones for reconnaissance that look, fly, and sound like birds.

Today’s drones are easy to detect acoustically, visually, and electronically. As counter-UAS systems improve, traditional quadcopters and fixed-wing UAS systems are becoming increasingly ineffective for close-range surveillance.  

Flapping-wing aircraft have existed for years, but have lacked the performance, endurance, and control required for real-world deployment. We’re changing that by engineering a high-performance, stealth-optimized system built from first principles for efficiency, autonomy, and reliable field use.

The final frontier of surveillance won’t look like machines; it will look like wildlife already in the sky. 

Maybe birds aren't real?
one_liner: We're building robot birds for surveillance.

name: Foaster
long_description:
Foaster is an AI-native consulting firm for AI transformation, powered by agents instead of armies of consultants.

Companies are spending millions on AI tools, pilots, workshops, and roadmaps. But most confuse AI adoption with AI transformation. Adoption is buying tools. Transformation is understanding how work should change across every team, workflow, and role. Traditional consulting moves too slowly for that: a few interviews, a few workshops, a static roadmap, then the company is left to execute.

Foaster uses AI agents to go much faster and much deeper. Agents interview employees at scale, map how work actually happens, and build in days a roadmap showing what should be automated, redesigned, or improved first. Then Foaster stays embedded to keep the transformation moving through adoption tracking, deeply personalized upskilling, and continuous follow-up.

The result is the precision and scale of AI, with human experts brought in where judgment, expertise and implementation matter most.
one_liner: Agents that help your company transform for AI.

name: Eden Robotics
long_description: We're building robots that just work and use them to deliver autonomous services at scale. Our first use case is semi-humanoid robots for manufacturing and logistics. Unlike traditional robotics companies, we don't sell robots, we provide physical agents for hire where companies pay for the robots based on usage, decreasing the barrier to entry and expanding the robotics market as a whole.
one_liner: Autonomous services for humanity.

name: TesterArmy
long_description:
TesterArmy is an AI agent that tests websites and mobile apps. It monitors production on a schedule and runs automatically on every GitHub Pull Request, delivering screenshots, recordings, and actionable bug reports.

Describe tests in plain English. The agent handles login flows, OAuth, and OTPs, no scripts to write or maintain. We catch the regressions and UX issues that code review misses.
one_liner: Test your app with AI, catch bugs before users do

name: Amboras
long_description: Amboras puts your entire e-commerce on autopilot. It builds your store, continuously optimizes it, reads your analytics, and learns what converts - all autonomously. No developers. No agencies. No guessing. Today it sells to humans. Tomorrow it sells to AI agents.
one_liner: Let AI sell your stuff on autopilot

name: Aster
long_description:
We're an AI Research lab that utilizes complex agentic workflows to accelerate the discovery of novel AI research. We've discovered novel optimizers, language modelling architectures, and work in interpretability.

We develop products and conduct frontier research, pushing the bounds of automating research.
one_liner: The First AI-Native AI Research Lab

name: OpenWork
long_description: OpenWork is a desktop app that lets people connect to their existing skills, MCPs, and agents. Users can download the app for free, try it with over 50+ model providers, and easily share their setup with their team.
one_liner: The open source alternative to Claude Cowork

name: ProjectX
long_description:
Every computer ever made forces you to do one thing at a time. One cursor. One keyboard. One Hardware. One app in focus. Fifty years. Nobody questioned it.

We did. We started over.

We built InfinityOS, a fundamentally new computer OS on the cloud from ground up.

Infinity runs every app in its own independent computer -- own GPU, own input, own environment. Windows and Linux in the same session. Humans and agents working side by side. No concurrency ceiling. Cold start in seconds. One URL.
one_liner: Infinity: the first OS where humans and agents work with no limits.

name: Arzana
long_description: Fortune 500 companies and the fastest-growing manufacturing firms use Arzana’s AI platform to automate order entry, quoting, and customer updates. So teams can scale faster, respond sooner, and grow without adding overhead.
one_liner: AI automation for the manufacturing office

name: Pentagon
long_description: Pentagon is a workspace for your AI employees to communicate, coordinate, and get work done as a team.
one_liner: Your AI agents, working as a team.

name: Expanse
long_description:
Expanse unlocks wasted GPU capacity. We recover idle compute through three capabilities: resource prediction (right-sizing job submissions before they reach the scheduler), optimisation suggestions (code and config changes researchers can apply themselves), and failure prediction (catching jobs that will fail before they consume hours of GPU time).

We’re four engineers. We ran HPC and GPU training workloads at the largest quant funds and national supercomputing centres. We faced this problem first hand and the only fix was to over-provision and burn millions. Ismaeel built the first multimodal HPC resource predictor as research at EPCC (Edinburgh’s Parallel Computing Centre), which beat every published baseline. This is the tool we wish we had.
one_liner: Unlock wasted GPU capacity.

name: YouArt
long_description: YouArt helps storytellers create AI originals using our industry-leading video agent, launch their original concepts, get funded directly by early fans, and earn from their audience.
one_liner: Patreon for AI originals

name: Runtime
long_description:
Runtime (runtm.com) gives engineering teams control and visibility to enable anyone in their org to use coding agents securely.

Eng leaders rolling out coding agents have no way to see what's happening, set boundaries, or safely let non-engineers use them. We provide sandboxed environments, session-level observability, and configurable guardrails so anyone on your team can ship with coding agents without breaking prod.

We're live with fast-growing YC scaleups empowering their Engineers, PMs, designers, marketers, and ops to contribute to their codebase or build prod-grade zero-to-one apps.
one_liner: Let all your team ship safely with coding agents

name: Kinect
long_description:
The product detail page is one of the last unchanged surfaces in commerce. Brands have spent years getting sophisticated at driving traffic there but nobody fixed what happens when shoppers arrive.

Kinect is the AI shopping assistant layer for e-commerce. We plug into ecommerce stores and give agents live access to your catalog, inventory, and policies. A brand’s online sales rep that can answer all a customer’s questions, help them find the right products, convince them. The website itself adapts to the shopper’s context: it considers the ads the user clicked on, their searches, filters, scrolling behavior, chat context to all show the shopper what they need to see.

We're building for human shoppers today and the AI agents that will shop for them tomorrow. Either way, the product page needs to get a lot smarter. That's Kinect – the product page finally does what it was supposed to do all along.
one_liner: Personalized storefronts for every visitor

name: Indexable
long_description: Sandbox infrastructure for AI agents, with full-environment forks and snapshots across files, processes, memory, and databases.
one_liner: sandbox infrastructure for AI agents

name: AgentPhone
long_description: Agents can't act in the real world today. They need carrier access, identity, and trust. AgentPhone gives every agent its own phone number to reach people through messages and calls.
one_liner: Phone Numbers for AI Agents

name: Arden
long_description:
Arden is the AI-native platform for internal audit and SOX teams.

We build AI agents that automatically pull evidence from your stack, test controls end-to-end, and produce audit-ready workpapers in minutes instead of weeks.

Internal audit is a massive but underserved market. Every public company in the US is required to do SOX testing, yet teams still run it through spreadsheets and screenshots. Arden is the engine that does this work.
one_liner: AI agents that automate SOX control testing.

name: Revnu
long_description:
Revnu is a growth team for founders addicted to building. 

Point us at your product and autonomous agents start running your SEO, ads, cold outreach, A/B tests and more. All sharing a single intelligence layer, so every channel makes the others smarter. 

You keep shipping. We run the business.
one_liner: Everything but the app itself

name: Asendia AI
long_description: Asendia AI builds AI recruiters for staffing agencies and enterprise companies. It clones their best recruiters into AI agents that match, screen, and submit candidates 10x faster.
one_liner: AI Recruiters for Staffing Agencies and Enterprise

name: Mochatrade
long_description: Mochatrade lets global traders trade perpetual futures on US stocks with up to 20x leverage. Access 50+ US stocks including TSLA, NVDA, AAPL. Mocha is fully self-custodial and no US brokerage account is needed. Traders on-ramp in local currencies and get professional-grade execution on the world's most liquid equities. Starting with India (140M+ demat account holders), and expanding across other markets.
one_liner: US stock perps for global traders

name: Manicule
long_description:
Manicule is an AI-native technical documentation agency. We own technical documentation end-to-end for developer tool companies, including information architecture, messaging, writing, design, and QA. Agents handle the mechanical parts like code verification and auditing at a scale and speed no human team can match, while humans refine the thinking and make the docs actually good. We're at $15K MRR and profitable, with clients like Supermemory, Greptile, Reducto, and Rootly. Supermemory's docs drove a 30% improvement in answer success rate and went viral on Twitter, all shipped in 23 days.

Every dev tool founder knows their docs are broken but simply don't have the time to fix them. The old solution was hiring a full-time technical writer who understands engineering, marketing, and devrel. That role is really hard and expensive to hire for, so docs stay broken. Naman started freelance writing for developer tools 3 years ago and realized that you can't one-shot docs. They require tight feedback loops with the engineering team, multiple review cycles, and real product understanding. When he worked with Supermemory, they had two products that sounded identical to customers. He got on calls with the CEO, figured out the right positioning for each product, and restructured the entire docs around it. That kind of work requires judgment and context that agents simply don’t have.

On the other hand, testing every code snippet against a live API, auditing hundreds of pages for broken links, and drafting from OpenAPI specs is grunt work that agents do in minutes. The insight behind Manicule is that good documentation requires both, and nobody has packaged them together. Shreyans was a founding engineer at Supermemory, saw the impact of good docs firsthand, and joined Naman to productize Manicule. We're now a team of 5, building toward that vision. Thousands of AI startups are launching dev tools every month, and docs are the single biggest asset they're all neglecting.
one_liner: AI Native Technical Documentation Studio

name: Gigacatalyst
long_description:
We provide a AI customization layer that learns your APIs and embeds in your product, so your customers can build their own apps on your SaaS. Each customer can now adapt your product to match their workflows perfectly, and share it across their team with our in-built app store.

The result is that customers use your SaaS more, retain for longer, and expand quicker, because they get bespoke implementation for their exact usecase, without waiting.

We're live with the top Series B companies with 90% repeat usage rate. Our customers tell us that Gigacatalyst is the best way to increase usage, retention, and expansion in 2026.
one_liner: Customize your software to every user with AI

name: Klaimee
long_description:
Klaimee is the first insurance for your AI agents. It covers what traditional E&O and cyber explicitly carve out, so you can deploy agentic AI at scale with real peace of mind.
Built for companies deploying agentic AI, self-serve from day one.

The problem: AI agents are taking actions autonomously buying, emailing, modifying sensitive data. AB 316 already holds deployers liable. EU AI Act enforces in August. Cyber and E&O insurance are excluding AI claims. Companies shipping agents have zero coverage and no third-party proof their agent is safe. Enterprise legal asks "who pays if your agent breaks something?" and there's no good answer.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
We built the answer. Critical-category risk evaluation, certification, financial guarantee, liability insurance and the documentation enterprise procurement needs to sign off.

Team: Ines (ex-General Manager at SafetyWing, grew insurance product from $5M to $60M revenue, 5 years launching insurance products from scratch and structuring a TokioMarine MGA into its own carrier) + Julien (AI software engineer + corporate strategy, enterprise compliance).

We understand how insurance works, what enterprises require, and why startups can't wait 6 months for either.
one_liner: Liability insurance for AI Agents. You deploy agents, we cover you.

name: KugelAudio
long_description: Kugel is an enterprise-ready TTS model, available on-prem, with a focus on European languages and low latency.
one_liner: Kugel is an on-prem enterprise TTS supporting 25+ languages

name: Modern
long_description:
Modern helps IT, HR, and Finance teams automatically resolve 80%+ of high-volume requests. Teams define workflows in plain language, set approval rules and policies, and Modern handles the rest: password resets, access provisioning, expense approvals, on-boarding checklists, and more. Everything runs with full audit trails, role-based approvals, and enterprise-grade security built in.

Modern works alongside your existing ITSM with no rip-and-replace required or runs as your ITSM from day one. Most teams are live in under a day. For teams that want to go fully hands-off, 100% automation via a fully managed IT services are also available.
one_liner: AI agents for IT, HR & Operations teams

name: ReasonBlocks
long_description: ReasonBlocks makes AI agents more accurate and cheaper by catching failures mid-run and compounding reasoning patterns across every agent you deploy. Plugs into your existing agent stack in minutes and starts improving results from the first call.
one_liner: Infra layer for smarter and cheaper AI agents

name: InsForge
long_description: InsForge is a Postgres-based backend with auth, storage, compute, hosting, and AI gateway. Built for coding agents.
one_liner: The backend platform for AI-native developers

name: Playabl.ai
long_description: Playabl.ai is an AI game builder that lets anyone create games and interactive experiences by chatting with AI.
one_liner: Prompt-to-play AI game builder for everyone

name: Framewise Health
long_description: We're building the world's first personalized AI-generated videos for patients, specific to their health history and preferred language.
one_liner: AI-personalized patient recovery videos

name: Clawvisor
long_description: Clawvisor lets AI agents use apps like Gmail, Slack, and Google Drive without going rogue or ever seeing your credentials. You approve tasks once. Clawvisor enforces them on every request.
one_liner: The Authorization Layer for AI Agents

name: Intelligence Factory
long_description:
Robotics is the new paradigm. With hardware converging, Intelligence is the biggest bottleneck. Our world was built for humans and we're giving robots the ability to reason and act like us. 

The way we learn any task - by seeing, doing, and feeling - is how we train robots. We're building general intelligence that works on any robot and fits seamlessly within our world.
one_liner: Human Intelligence for Robots

name: Maquoketa Research
one_liner: Intelligent one-way attack drones

name: Cohesion
long_description: Cohesion is building AI agents for hedge funds. Our agents track earnings and non-traditional datasets like podcasts and X/twitter. Analysts spend hours a week manually tracking these data sources and still miss relevant investing signals. Now, our agents do it for them autonomously.
one_liner: Your public equities agentic teammate

name: Huscarl
long_description:
Huscarl is an AI-native actuarial advisory for large companies ($50M+ turnover) to optimize their insurance decisions. Our approach helps them save ~30% premiums for similar coverage, and manage their own risks like an insurance company would.

Our technology:
- scans through risks and quantifies them
- translates complex B2B insurance policies into actuarial language
- tells if companies are paying the right $ for their coverage
- tells them what to keep, change or kill in their insurance program
one_liner: Actuarial intelligence for corporate risk managers
